snapshot.porque_desc: Unlike the domestic orders module where dynamic master data can update in real time, <bold>International Freight</bold> quotes involve customs compliance and strict tariff agreements. The system freezes a faithful image ("Snapshot") of the reference tables to audit the agreed values before the board and financial control authorities.

smart_import.err_json_formato_msg: The JSON file does not have the format the system understands.

smart_import.err_json_formato_sug2: Each item in the array must be an object with the order fields
smart_import.err_json_formato_sug3: If possible, prefer Excel (.xlsx) — it's easier to edit
smart_import.err_json_malformado_msg: The JSON file has a syntax error.
smart_import.err_json_malformado_causa: Invalid JSON — trailing comma, unclosed key, wrong quotes, etc.
smart_import.err_json_malformado_sug1: Paste the content into https://jsonlint.com to identify the error line
smart_import.err_json_malformado_sug2: Check if all curly braces open ({) and close (})
smart_import.err_json_malformado_sug3: Check if there is no comma after the last item
smart_import.err_json_malformado_sug4: Strings must use double quotes, not single quotes

smart_import.err_pdf_protegido_sug2: Or use tools like SmallPDF/iLovePDF to remove the password
smart_import.err_pdf_protegido_sug3: After removing the protection, upload it again
smart_import.err_pdf_escaneado_msg: The PDF appears to be scanned — it contains only images, with no extractable text.
smart_import.err_pdf_escaneado_causa: Scanned documents need to undergo OCR (optical recognition) first.
smart_import.err_pdf_escaneado_sug1: Use Adobe Acrobat > Recognize Text (OCR) and save again
smart_import.err_pdf_escaneado_sug2: Or online tools: SmallPDF OCR, ilovepdf.com/ocr
smart_import.err_pdf_escaneado_sug3: After OCR, export to Excel (.xlsx) — more reliable
smart_import.err_pdf_invalido_msg: The uploaded file is not a real PDF.
smart_import.err_pdf_invalido_causa: Files saved as "web page" (.html) do not work even with a .pdf extension.
smart_import.err_pdf_invalido_sug1: Open in browser and save as a real PDF (Ctrl+P > Save as PDF)
smart_import.err_pdf_invalido_sug2: Or prefer Excel (.xlsx) — extraction is more reliable
smart_import.err_pdf_invalido_sug3: Scanned PDFs (image) are not supported — OCR is needed
